name: Enhanced Pyrimido-oxazine Biphenyl Urea
rationale: Pyrimido-oxazine core: H-bond with catalytic Asn
Biphenyl extension: Enhanced aromatic stacking in hydrophobic pocket
Urea linker: Appropriate length to reach catalytic His

name: Covalent Pyrimido-oxazine Acrylamide
rationale: Acrylamide: Covalent warhead targeting catalytic His
Alkyl chain: Spacer to positioning warhead correctly

name: DGAT1 Bisubstrate Mimetic
rationale: C8 acyl chain: Acyl-CoA substrate mimic
Phenyl carboxylic acid: DAG mimic + tunnel blocking
Overall: Both substrate binding sites occupied
